news.summary: FEATURE  Tech was hit again on Friday by the worsening selloff in chip makers and other AI stocks.  Advanced Micro Devices advanced 0.4% and Intel dropped 0.3%. Applied Materials was down 3.7% and Corning fell 1.

news.summary: SK Hynix stock just staged a dramatic reversal after touching a fresh low, but the forces behind the bounce raise as many questions as they answer about whether this is a genuine recovery or a technically driven squeeze running out of road.
